column1: # The North Star invariant: each frontier fact has exactly ONE canonical writer.
# arch_score.sh KPI-3 counts files OTHER than the owner that match write-pattern;
# zero = clean (single writer). As lanes demote cloned writers to read-only
# views, these turn clean and the score rises. Add a row per frontier as the
# domain model is enforced. Keep patterns tight (a write call, not a read).
# header spine: the validated-header frontier. pindex_best_header must become a
# pure VIEW; today the importer writes it independently (D8) → not yet clean.
# derived state: the coins applied-height. utxo_apply owns advancement; other
# writers of the applied height are cloned ledgers.
